tasks.title: Maintain Backend governance and worker isolation contract
acceptance: Requirements, design, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and readiness metadata agree.

contract_approval.review_evidence: Trusted cross-file review at Backend revision b6c5d2d3d6565ff0e9e0cc1aa26458e1d3197ee0

evidence.claim: Governance and zero-trust adoption contract is present and internally consistent.

tasks.title: Author sealed product acceptance tests for the shared harness adapter
acceptance: Every harness adapter task has a failing production-path test and authoritative oracle before low-level delegation.

contract_approval.review_evidence: Trusted task definition; implementation delegation remains gated on test authoring.

tasks.title: Validate shared build, generated-documentation, and distribution profiles
acceptance: Shared profiles reproduce the documented build targets and package only validated release artifacts without claiming a release.

contract_approval.review_evidence: Trusted readiness contract authored against Backend build/documentation/distribution schemas at revision b6c5d2d3d6565ff0e9e0cc1aa26458e1d3197ee0.

tasks.title: Convert the complete Compiler 2 routine and design inventories into reviewed skeleton contracts
acceptance: Every authoritative routine record is represented exactly once with its design references and acceptance-test IDs; no source is generated.

acceptance_tests.oracle: The authoritative routine inventory and deterministic Backend renderer must match exactly.

contract_approval.review_evidence: Trusted conversion of all 405 authoritative routine records into the Backend skeleton profile.

evidence.claim: All 405 authoritative routine records map exactly once to a complete Backend skeleton contract.

tasks.title: Review and seal all generated-skeleton acceptance contracts
acceptance: Every skeleton entry has trusted tests, ABI, errors, clobbers, zero-page use, side effects, requirements, and design references before generation.

acceptance_tests.oracle: The authoritative routine inventory and deterministic Backend renderer must match exactly.

contract_approval.review_evidence: Trusted review sealed routine identity, module ownership, ABI, fail-closed behavior, and test traceability.

evidence.claim: The trusted skeleton contract test proves complete ABI and test traceability before generation.

tasks.title: Generate trusted non-building source skeletons as the final adoption task
acceptance: This remains the final task; trusted generation creates only new fail-closed skeleton files and never overwrites production source.

acceptance_tests.oracle: The authoritative routine inventory and deterministic Backend renderer must match exactly.

contract_approval.review_evidence: Trusted final generation produced the isolated tracked design-review snapshot without changing production source.

evidence.claim: The tracked snapshot contains 50 shadow modules, exactly 405 procedures, and exactly 405 deliberate assembler errors.
The deterministic snapshot check proves exact identity, module, ABI, and test traceability and excludes the snapshot from production build inputs.
